data: [{"name":"linear__list_issues","description":"List Linear issues, optionally filtered by assignee, state, team, or project.","signature":"linear__list_issues({assignee?: string, state?: string, team?: string, project?: string}) → { id: string, title: string, assignee: string, state: \"in_progress\"|…(+1028)

tool_calls.name: execute_js
tool_calls.input: {"code":"const issues = linear__list_issues({ state: \"in_progress\" }); const counts = new Map(); for (const i of issues) { if (!i.assignee) continue; counts.set(i.assignee, (counts.get(i.assignee) || 0) + 1); } let top = null, topCount = 0; for (const [login, n] of counts) { if (n > topCount) { top = login; topCount = n; } } ({ top, topCount, total: issues.length, unique: counts.size });"}
